title: Truck overturns in Kaaimans Pass
description: GEORGE NEWS - A multi-trailer truck has...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A multi-trailer truck has overturned in Kaaimans Pass this afternoon, but no lane closures were necessary.

Chantèl Edwards, chief of communications at George Municipality, said Metro ambulance services and Provincial Traffic are on the scene.

The truck ploughed through the concrete barrier on the uphill in the pass in the direction of George.

More information will follow as it becomes available.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
